channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Hungary vs Armenia live stream: how to watch FIFA World Cup 2026 qualifier online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch Hungary vs Armenia live streams online and for free, as the World Cup qualifier feels like a must-win game for both sides in Budapest.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Crypto spent millions to defeat Sherrod Brown and elect allies. It's ready for a repeat in 2026
item.description: The cryptocurrency industry spent millions last year to unseat a longtime critic, Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown in Ohio, and install its allies in Washington.
item.dc:creator: Joey Cappelletti, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The Apple Mac roadmap for 2025 and 2026 may have leaked – through macOS Tahoe 26
item.description: We could get new MacBook Pros, MacBook Airs, Mac minis, Mac Studios, and iMacs across the next few months.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Former Syrian president Assad is video gaming in a luxury Moscow apartment: Report
item.description: Syria’s former President Bashar al-Assad, whose notoriously brutal rule over the country earned him the nickname “The Butcher,” was deposed in 2024 after years of bloody civil war.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Valve's Steam Deck-inspired VR headset might be launching soon – here's what we know
item.description: There's lots of buzz around a potential Steam Frame VR headset launch. Here's what we know about the mysterious device.
item.dc:creator: Hamish Hector, TechRadar

item.title: AMD quietly launched a new product which could soon prove immensely useful for AI inference and beyond
item.description: New AMD Solarflare X4 Ethernet adapters combine proven trading performance with features which could benefit AI inference and edge workloads.
item.dc:creator: Wayne Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Intel details new efficient Xeon processor line
item.description: Intel has revealed more details of its next-generation Xeon 6+ E-core CPU family, codenamed “Clearwater Forest,” with a focus on power and performance efficiency.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Battlefield 6 release time - here's when you'll be able to preload and play Battlefield 6 in your timezone
item.description: Here's the Battlefield 6 release time for your timezone. This includes information on preloading, and details on exactly when you can jump into the game.
item.dc:creator: Jake Green, TechRadar

item.title: AI first: The EU’s new AI strategy
item.description:
EU Commission President von der Leyen called for an AI-first mindset at the presentation of the Apply AI and AI in Science Strategy.
miss.cabul – Shutterstock.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Ping Identity’s Kelvin Brewer on ensuring flexible identity service
item.description: Risk-based decisions should drive ICAM capabilities whether on premise, in the cloud or in hybrid environments, says Ping Identity engineering leader. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Ping Identity’s Kelvin Brewer on ensuring flexible identity service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: PyCrucible: An easy way to redistribute your Python apps
item.description: One of Python’s most persistent limitations is how unnecessarily difficult it is to take a Python program and give it to another user as a self-contained click-to-run package. The design of the Python language makes this surprisingly difficult to do.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tesla offers cheaper versions of 2 electric vehicles in bid to win back market share in tough year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tesla rolled out new, cheaper versions of two of its electric car models on Tuesday in hopes the offerings will help revive flagging sales but investors dumped its stock anyway.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Kentucky lawsuit says Roblox fails to protect children on its popular online gaming platform
item.description: FRANKFORT, Ky. (AP) — Kentucky's attorney general claimed Tuesday that the online gaming platform Roblox has become a “playground for predators” as he announced a lawsuit accusing the company of lax child safety measures.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: IBM integrates Anthropic Claude into AI IDE and other tools
item.description: IBM and Anthropic have partnered in an effort to accelerate the development of enterprise AI applications, by integrating Anthropic’s Claude large language models (LLMs) into IBM software products, beginning with IBM’s new AI-leveraging IDE (integrated development environment).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: IBM touts agentic AI orchestration, cryptographic risk controls
item.description: At its TechXchange 2025 conference this week, IBM took the wraps off a number of software packages that have been updated to help enterprises more efficiently operate their growing AI infrastructures.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Deloitte to partially refund Australian government for report with apparent AI-generated errors
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Deloitte Australia will partially refund the 440,000 Australian dollars ($290,000) paid by the Australian government for a report that was littered with apparent AI-generated errors, including a fabricated quote from a federal court judgment and references to nonexistent
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Google's Play Store shake-up looms after Supreme Court refuses to delay overhaul of the monopoly
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday refused to protect Google from a year-old order requiring a major makeover of its Android app store that's designed to unleash more competition against a system that a jury declared an illegal monopoly.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: OpenAI and chipmaker AMD sign chip supply partnership for AI infrastructure
item.description: Semiconductor maker AMD will supply its chips to artificial intelligence company OpenAI as part of an agreement to team up on building AI infrastructure, the companies said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: Intel news and insights | AMD news and insights With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World
